77309785.title: List of Reform UK MPs
77309785.extract: This is a list of Reform UK MPs. It includes all past and present members of Parliament elected to the British House of Commons representing Reform UK. Members of the European Parliament, the Scottish Parliament, the Senedd, London Assembly and members of local councils are not listed. All eight of Reform UK's MPs have been a Conservative Party member at some point.
